---
title: "LCZ_simplification"
author: "Eva Beele"
date: "2026-06-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(terra)

# LCZ raster inladen
lcz <- rast("C:/Users/u0138370/OneDrive - KU Leuven/EES-FNL-BRANCH - 1. Data/Sampling_design/LCZ/LCZ_StudyArea.tif")
plot(lcz)

# Bekijk de aanwezige waarden
freq(lcz)

# Reclassificeren
lcz_3class <- subst(
  lcz,
  from = 1:17,
  to = c(rep(1,3), rep(2,7), rep(3,7))
)

# Labels toevoegen
levels(lcz_3class) <- data.frame(
  value = c(1,2,3),
  class = c("Compact urban",
            "Open urban",
            "Natural")
)

# Opslaan
writeRaster(lcz_3class,
            "C:/Users/u0138370/OneDrive - KU Leuven/EES-FNL-BRANCH - 1. Data/Sampling_design/R/Output/LCZ_3classes.tif",
            overwrite = TRUE)

plot(lcz_3class)
freq(lcz_3class)
unique(values(lcz_3class))
```
